item.title: About
item.description:
Self-Introduction

Hello everyone, I’m WS, a software engineer with over ten years of experience. I primarily work with C#, C++, and Golang, and currently focus on web backend development.

Software development is a technical craft, and I hope to explore specific technical practices with readers here. For now, everything is just getting started.

Blog Setup

This blog is built with hugo
Using the hugo-papermod theme
Comment functionality is powered by giscus

Special thanks to the developers of these open-source projects.
